commands: sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'echo  | base64 -d > ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/bench-debug.yaml && kubectl delete pod bench-debug -n yanxi-validation --ignore-not-found 2>&1; kubectl apply -f ~/workspace/yanxi/stage4/bench-debug.yaml 2>&1'
sudo -iu ec2-user bash -lc 'kubectl -n yanxi-validation logs bench-debug --tail=70 2>&1'
